actorRole.description: Abstract role of the primary initiating or experiencing entity in a narrative event. Participates in CSN_FINGERPRINT_V1.

action.description: Discrete structural action that occurred. Observed fact only. Tense does not participate. Participates in CSN_FINGERPRINT_V1.
action.governanceNote: Interpretive, causal, sentiment, outcome, and aggregation verbs are prohibited. challenged_authority is the only permitted compound token; its semantics are locked by ACTION_TAXONOMY_CONTRACT.md Section VI. was_* tokens represent passive-voice organizational actions only.

objectRole.description: Abstract structural role of the entity or object the action was directed at, received by, or acted upon. Participates in CSN_FINGERPRINT_V1.
objectRole.governanceNote: Null contributes empty string to fingerprint normalization. objectRole SHALL NOT equal actorRole within the same canonical object. unspecified_object is fallback of last resort — requires confirmation an object exists but cannot be classified.

contextRole.description: Situational or environmental frame within which the event occurred. Structural phase markers only — not calendar time, not lifecycle, not emotional state. Participates in CSN_FINGERPRINT_V1.
contextRole.governanceNote: Null contributes empty string to fingerprint normalization. Calendar dates and week markers are governed by TIME_BUCKET_REGISTRY_V1 exclusively. Lifecycle injection, recurrence encoding, and emotional interpretation are prohibited. unspecified_context is fallback of last resort.

ncaSubclass.description: Narrative subclass assigned by NCA. Exactly one per CSN object. Hybrid subclassing is prohibited. Participates in CSN_FINGERPRINT_V1.
ncaSubclass.governanceNote: Assigned by NCA; SANTA validates only. If subclass cannot be deterministically assigned, NCA must reject. Taxonomy is locked — no addition or modification without version bump.

definitions.crowd_event: Event initiated or constituted by fan or audience behavior
definitions.ritual_moment: Habitual or ceremonial action performed by an actor or group
definitions.anecdotal_beat: Incidental narrative occurrence without structural consequence
definitions.conflict_flashpoint: Visible, observable tension event between parties

timeBucketRegistry.usageScope: ANE-level staging only. Does not persist to canonical CSN object. Informs timestampContext prose field only.

tierA.description: Season phase buckets — structural phase of the football calendar. Mutually exclusive, exhaustive. If Tier A cannot be determined, assign offseason as fallback and flag for review.

tierB.description: Calendar week buckets — ISO 8601 standard. Always assigned alongside Tier A. Never assign Tier A without Tier B.
